name: curl
description: Transfer data from or to a server

name: -X
--request
options.description: Specify the request method to use

name: -H
--header
options.description: Pass a custom header to the server

name: -d
--data
options.description: Send the given data in a POST request

name: -o
--output
options.description: Write output to a file instead of stdout

name: -O
--remote-name
options.description: Save output using the remote file name

name: -s
--silent
options.description: Do not show progress or error messages

name: -i
--include
options.description: Include the response headers in the output
